name: parallel-coding-assistant
description: Run the MCP testbed against any workspace and choose batch or line-by-line command flow.

parallelCodingAssistant.repoRoot.description: Absolute path to the MCP repo root that contains mcp_testbed/run_case.ps1

parallelCodingAssistant.defaultRequest.default: Build a coding assistant MCP with built-in parallelism.
parallelCodingAssistant.defaultRequest.description: Default request text used to seed the prompt
